ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the game (Home or Away) */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the home team */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., home, away, neutral) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "officials" TEXT /* List of officials who officiated the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team logo */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Point Guard, Power Forward) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "assist_percentage" REAL /* Assist percentage for the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team */,
  "block_percentage" REAL /* Block percentage for the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating for the team */,
  "defensive_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Defensive rebound percentage for the team */,
  "defensive_rebounds" REAL /* Number of defensive rebounds by the team */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage for the team */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of field goal attempts by the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage for the team */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the team */,
  "free_throw_attempt_rate" REAL /* Free throw attempt rate for the team */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of free throw attempts by the team */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage for the team */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the team */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating for the team */,
  "offensive_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage for the team */,
  "offensive_rebounds" REAL /* Number of offensive rebounds by the team */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "steal_percentage" REAL /* Steal percentage for the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team */,
  "three_point_attempt_rate" REAL /* Three point attempt rate for the team */,
  "three_point_field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of three point field goal attempts by the team */,
  "three_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Three point field goal percentage for the team */,
  "three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three point field goals made by the team */,
  "total_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Total rebound percentage for the team */,
  "total_rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds by the team */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage for the team */,
  "turnover_percentage" INTEGER /* Turnover percentage for the team */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Number of turnovers by the team */,
  "two_point_field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of two point field goal attempts by the team */,
  "two_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Two point field goal percentage for the team */,
  "two_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of two point field goals made by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage for the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team */,
  "fouls_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of fouls drawn by the team */,
  "second_chance_points" REAL /* Number of second chance points by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three point field goals made by the player */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "password_salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data of the statistic version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_versions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_versions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES game_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_statistics_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data of the statistic version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_versions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_versions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES player_game_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "can_read" INTEGER /* Whether the role can read the table */,
  "can_write" INTEGER /* Whether the role can write to the table */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the role can delete from the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
